meaning: n.施舍品,悲哀,失业救济金vt.发放救济
examples: The government is changing the rules for claiming dole.
Middle-class families see their graduate offspring on the dole queue and wonder why they bothered paying school fees.
By contrast, Senator Dole won big.
An unknown state Senator, Kay Hagan, now has pulled ahead of Elizabeth Dole in many polls.
But if this strategy is going to work, Dole needs more than good trainers and stamina.
